note: Canonical staged issue data for the remaining EPIC-23 through EPIC-28 roadmap work. EPIC-21 and EPIC-22 are already completed and are intentionally not created from this file. Review with tools/github/create-issues.ps1 -Input tools/github/next-roadmap-issues.json -DryRun before applying.

epics.title: EPIC-23: HTTP Response Writer and Request Context
epics.summary: Convert result descriptors into HTTP responses and pass route/query context to handlers.

epics.title: EPIC-24: V8 Module Loading and Bootstrap Runtime
epics.summary: Load the bootstrap stdlib and app module entrypoint in V8 with documented intrinsic boundaries.

epics.title: EPIC-25: Release Packaging and Distribution
epics.summary: Define and validate installable Windows, Linux, and macOS package artifacts with checksums.

epics.title: EPIC-26: Cross-platform CI Expansion
epics.summary: Add Linux and macOS default gates and make optional V8/provider gates explicit.

epics.title: EPIC-27: Runtime Security / Capabilities Enforcement
epics.summary: Enforce declared capabilities for provider access and add filesystem/network capability skeleton diagnostics.

epics.title: EPIC-28: Public Alpha Docs and Examples
epics.summary: Refresh public docs and examples around executable, verified Sloppy workflows.
suggestedTasks: Executable SQLite Demo or Explicit Deferral
